task_completion.description: Navigate to the correct task within the project and experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'PCR Protocol Template' task within the 'Protocol Library' project and 'Templates' experiment.
The 'Standard PCR v1' protocol is opened and its details are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Locate the target step within the protocol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Master Mix Preparation' step is visible or selected within the protocol view.

task_completion.description: Select the correct inventory item to link.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or interface for linking inventory is open, and 'Taq Polymerase' from the 'Enzymes' repository is selected or being searched for.

task_completion.description: Verify that the item is successfully linked to the step.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Taq Polymerase' item is explicitly shown as associated or linked to the 'Master Mix Preparation' step (e.g., listed under materials, items, or a linked inventory section for that specific step).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SciNote web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SciNote web application in a browser, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The linking was performed using the application's native UI features.
integrity.visual_evidence: The linking dialogs and UI elements are genuine parts of the SciNote interface, without signs of HTML manipulation or text editing.

integrity.description: No scripts or direct database commands were used.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible terminal windows running scripts or SQL commands to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is 'Protocol Library', experiment is 'Templates', task is 'PCR Protocol Template', protocol is 'Standard PCR v1', step is 'Master Mix Preparation', inventory repository is 'Enzymes', and the item to link is 'Taq Polymerase'.
